intake_record.name: James Thompson
intake_record.special_needs: Lost all belongings in flood, needs documentation assistance

action_plan: LOW PRIORITY: Recovery phase support. Provide: 1) Basic first aid kit for minor cuts, 2) Emergency food/water supply, 3) Temporary documentation replacement assistance, 4) Referral to community mental health check-in. Individual is stable and does not require emergency intervention. Connect with NGO partner for case management in recovery phase.

resources.name: Recovery Phase Food Distribution
resources.capacity: Meal kits available for single-person households

resources.name: Documentation Assistance Desk
resources.capacity: Temporary ID and replacement document processing

evidence.content: In recovery phases, priority shifts to restoring dignity, normalcy, and self-reliance. Individuals should transition from emergency services to sustainable community support.
Disaster displacement often triggers anxiety and depression. Early integration of mental health screening prevents long-term trauma and aids recovery participation.
